title: Cycle Report
description: Schema for an Editorial Flow Cycle report.

cycleId.description: Unique identifier for this cycle, e.g. CYCLE-2024-001.

operator.description: Name or role of the person running the cycle.

materialId.description: Identifier for the material being cycled.

materialType.description: Type of material, e.g. draft essay, research note, landing page candidate, design memo.

cycleVersion.description: Version of the cycle model used, e.g. v0.1.

stations.description: Records for each station processed in this cycle.

rationale.description: Brief rationale for the outcome at this station.

notes.description: Additional notes for this station. Optional.

materialStatusAtEnd.description: The material's status at the end of the cycle.

gatesPassed.description: List of gates that returned PASS or READY.

gatesHeld.description: List of gates that returned HOLD, RETURN or STOP.

whatMustNotHappenNext.description: Description of explicitly prohibited next actions.

artefactsProduced.description: List of artefacts produced during this cycle, by ID. Empty if only the cycle report was produced.

statusOutcome.description: One of the eight valid cycle outcomes.
